name: food-kiosk-system
description: Production-ready self-service food kiosk monorepo with kiosk UI, KDS, admin panel, Express API, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Docker.

scripts.dev: npm -w @food/shared run build && concurrently "npm -w server run dev" "npm -w client run dev"
scripts.build: npm -w @food/shared run build && npm -w server run build && npm -w client run build
scripts.build:server: npm -w @food/shared run build && npm -w server run prisma:generate && npm -w server run build
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @food/shared run typecheck && npm -w server run typecheck && npm -w client run typecheck
